requirement_topic.en: DGSM Product Conformity / Registration + In-Country Importer of Record (MOCIIP)
requirement_topic.zh: DGSM产品符合性／注册 + 境内进口商（MOCIIP）
requirement_topic.zht: DGSM產品符合性／註冊 + 境內進口商（MOCIIP）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances entering Oman must clear the product conformity/registration process administered by the Directorate General for Standards and Metrology (DGSM) under the Ministry of Commerce, Industry and Investment Promotion (MOCIIP). For a standard refrigerator this consolidates several requirements into one market-access route: (1) electrical safety to GSO IEC 60335-2-24; (2) EMC to the GSO CISPR 14 series; (3) energy MEPS + GCC star label (GSO 2530); and, where applicable, (4) refrigerant/flammability documentation. There is no single CE-style mark; instead the regulated product is registered with DGSM and accompanied by a conformity certificate issued by a DGSM-recognised conformity body, supported by type-test reports (typically IECEE CB Scheme). Critically, the registration/clearance is held through an in-country importer of record — a legally established Omani entity — because a foreign manufacturer cannot itself register or clear goods. Goods are typically imported through the ports of Sohar or Salalah. Product documentation and labels must be in Arabic and reflect the 240 V, 50 Hz supply.
summary.zh: 进入阿曼的家用制冷器具须通过商工投资促进部（MOCIIP）下属标准计量总局（DGSM）管理的产品符合性／注册程序。对于标准电冰箱，这将若干要求整合为单一市场准入路径：（1）按GSO IEC 60335-2-24的电气安全；（2）按GSO CISPR 14系列的电磁兼容；（3）能效MEPS＋海合会星级标签（GSO 2530）；以及在适用时（4）制冷剂／可燃性文件。没有单一的CE式标识；受监管产品须在DGSM注册，并随附由DGSM认可的合格评定机构出具的符合性证书，辅以型式试验报告（通常为IECEE CB体系）。关键在于，注册／清关须通过境内进口商（importer of record）——一家合法设立的阿曼实体——持有，因为外国制造商本身不能注册或清关货物。货物通常经苏哈尔（Sohar）或塞拉莱（Salalah）口岸进口。产品文件和标签须为阿拉伯语，并反映240 V、50 Hz供电。
summary.zht: 進入阿曼的家用製冷器具須通過商工投資促進部（MOCIIP）下屬標準計量總局（DGSM）管理的產品符合性／註冊程序。對於標準電冰箱，這將若干要求整合為單一市場准入路徑：（1）按GSO IEC 60335-2-24的電氣安全；（2）按GSO CISPR 14系列的電磁相容；（3）能效MEPS＋海合會星級標籤（GSO 2530）；以及在適用時（4）製冷劑／可燃性文件。沒有單一的CE式標識；受監管產品須在DGSM註冊，並隨附由DGSM認可的合格評定機構出具的符合性證書，輔以型式試驗報告（通常為IECEE CB體系）。關鍵在於，註冊／清關須通過境內進口商（importer of record）——一家合法設立的阿曼實體——持有，因為外國製造商本身不能註冊或清關貨物。貨物通常經蘇哈爾（Sohar）或塞拉萊（Salalah）口岸進口。產品文件和標籤須為阿拉伯語，並反映240 V、50 Hz供電。

standards_or_laws: DGSM (Directorate General for Standards and Metrology, MOCIIP) — product conformity / registration scheme for regulated products
GSO IEC 60335-2-24 (safety) + GSO CISPR 14 series (EMC) + GSO 2530 (energy MEPS/label) — underlying conformity standards consolidated in the DGSM route
In-country importer of record — legally established Omani entity required to register and clear regulated goods

summary.en: In China, household refrigerating appliances require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before sale, plus a separate China Energy Label (GB 12021.2) administered by NDRC/SAMR. CCC is a mandatory third-party certification issued by CNCA-designated certification bodies to the manufacturer/holder; there is no requirement for a foreign in-country importer of record, because the certification is for the domestic Chinese market. There is no single Chinese mark equivalent to the consolidated DGSM registration: CCC covers safety/EMC and the China Energy Label covers energy, issued and displayed separately.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用制冷器具在销售前须取得涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）的中国强制认证（CCC），并另需由NDRC/SAMR管理的中国能效标识（GB 12021.2）。CCC为强制性第三方认证，由CNCA指定认证机构颁发给制造商／持证人；不要求外国境内进口商，因为该认证针对中国国内市场。中国没有单一等同于DGSM整合注册的标识：CCC涵盖安全／电磁兼容，中国能效标识涵盖能效，分别颁发和展示。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用製冷器具在銷售前須取得涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）的中國強制認證（CCC），並另需由NDRC/SAMR管理的中國能效標識（GB 12021.2）。CCC為強制性第三方認證，由CNCA指定認證機構頒發給製造商／持證人；不要求外國境內進口商，因為該認證針對中國國內市場。中國沒有單一等同於DGSM整合註冊的標識：CCC涵蓋安全／電磁相容，中國能效標識涵蓋能效，分別頒發和展示。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must build the Omani conformity package from scratch — CCC and the China Energy Label do not substitute: (1) DGSM conformity certificate — issued by a DGSM-recognised body, citing GSO IEC 60335-2-24, GSO CISPR 14, and GSO 2530; typically built on an IECEE CB Scheme report (which can reduce, but not eliminate, re-testing). (2) Energy MEPS + GCC star label — recalculation/registration to GSO methodology. (3) Arabic documentation and labelling — instructions and label content in Arabic; 240 V / 50 Hz rating declared. (4) In-country importer of record — the registration and customs clearance must be held by a legally established Omani importer; a Chinese exporter cannot self-register. (5) Voltage — China-tuned 220 V units may need re-rating/re-marking for 240 V. Clearance is through Sohar or Salalah and is gated on the importer presenting the DGSM conformity evidence.
gap.zh: 中国制造商须从头建立阿曼合规文件包——CCC和中国能效标识均不能替代：（1）DGSM符合性证书——由DGSM认可机构出具，引用GSO IEC 60335-2-24、GSO CISPR 14及GSO 2530；通常基于IECEE CB体系报告构建（可减少但不能免除补充检测）。（2）能效MEPS＋海合会星级标签——按GSO方法重新计算／注册。（3）阿拉伯语文件和标识——说明书和标签内容须为阿拉伯语；声明240 V／50 Hz额定。（4）境内进口商（importer of record）——注册和清关须由合法设立的阿曼进口商持有；中国出口商不能自行注册。（5）电压——针对中国调校的220 V产品可能需要为240 V重新额定／重新标识。清关经苏哈尔或塞拉莱口岸，并以进口商提交DGSM符合性证据为前提。
gap.zht: 中國製造商須從頭建立阿曼合規文件包——CCC和中國能效標識均不能替代：（1）DGSM符合性證書——由DGSM認可機構出具，引用GSO IEC 60335-2-24、GSO CISPR 14及GSO 2530；通常基於IECEE CB體系報告構建（可減少但不能免除補充檢測）。（2）能效MEPS＋海合會星級標籤——按GSO方法重新計算／註冊。（3）阿拉伯語文件和標識——說明書和標籤內容須為阿拉伯語；聲明240 V／50 Hz額定。（4）境內進口商（importer of record）——註冊和清關須由合法設立的阿曼進口商持有；中國出口商不能自行註冊。（5）電壓——針對中國調校的220 V產品可能需要為240 V重新額定／重新標識。清關經蘇哈爾或塞拉萊口岸，並以進口商提交DGSM符合性證據為前提。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — DGSM product conformity/registration via a DGSM-recognised body and held through an in-country Omani importer of record is required before import and sale; clearance at Sohar/Salalah is gated on it
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label display required before sale in China; no in-country foreign importer requirement

source.publisher: Ministry of Commerce, Industry and Investment Promotion (MOCIIP), Sultanate of Oman

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Market access to Oman for household refrigerators runs through DGSM product conformity/registration (consolidating GSO safety, EMC, and energy requirements), evidenced by a conformity certificate from a DGSM-recognised body and held through an in-country Omani importer of record. Chinese CCC and the China Energy Label do not substitute. Arabic documentation, a 240 V / 50 Hz rating, and clearance via Sohar or Salalah are required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 家用电冰箱进入阿曼的市场准入须通过DGSM产品符合性／注册（整合GSO安全、电磁兼容及能效要求），以DGSM认可机构出具的符合性证书为证据，并由境内阿曼进口商（importer of record）持有。中国CCC和中国能效标识不能替代。须备阿拉伯语文件、240 V／50 Hz额定，并经苏哈尔或塞拉莱口岸清关。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 家用電冰箱進入阿曼的市場准入須通過DGSM產品符合性／註冊（整合GSO安全、電磁相容及能效要求），以DGSM認可機構出具的符合性證書為證據，並由境內阿曼進口商（importer of record）持有。中國CCC和中國能效標識不能替代。須備阿拉伯語文件、240 V／50 Hz額定，並經蘇哈爾或塞拉萊口岸清關。

requirement_topic.en: Radio Type Approval — Smart / Wireless Refrigerators (TRA Oman)
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电型号核准——智能／无线电冰箱（阿曼TRA）
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電型號核准——智慧／無線電冰箱（阿曼TRA）

summary.en: Refrigerators with wireless connectivity (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or other radio modules for smart-home features) require radio/type approval from Oman's Telecommunications Regulatory Authority (TRA) before import and sale, in addition to DGSM product conformity. TRA approval covers the radio module's frequency use, emitted power, and conformity to the applicable radio standards (typically the GSO/ETSI-aligned radio standards). Approval is applied for through an Omani entity (commonly the in-country importer or an authorised agent), and the approved radio equipment must carry any required TRA marking/registration reference. A non-wireless refrigerator does not require TRA approval — only the DGSM conformity/registration route applies — so this requirement is conditional on the presence of a radio module.
summary.zh: 具无线连接功能（Wi-Fi、蓝牙或其他用于智能家居功能的无线电模块）的电冰箱，在进口和销售前除DGSM产品符合性外，还须取得阿曼电信监管局（TRA）的无线电／型号核准。TRA核准涵盖无线电模块的频率使用、发射功率及对适用无线电标准（通常为与GSO/ETSI对齐的无线电标准）的符合性。核准须通过阿曼实体（通常为境内进口商或授权代理）申请，且经核准的无线电设备须载有任何必需的TRA标识／注册引用。非无线电冰箱无需TRA核准——仅适用DGSM符合性／注册路径——因此此要求以是否存在无线电模块为条件。
summary.zht: 具無線連接功能（Wi-Fi、藍牙或其他用於智慧家居功能的無線電模組）的電冰箱，在進口和銷售前除DGSM產品符合性外，還須取得阿曼電信監管局（TRA）的無線電／型號核准。TRA核准涵蓋無線電模組的頻率使用、發射功率及對適用無線電標準（通常為與GSO/ETSI對齊的無線電標準）的符合性。核准須通過阿曼實體（通常為境內進口商或授權代理）申請，且經核准的無線電設備須載有任何必需的TRA標識／註冊引用。非無線電冰箱無需TRA核准——僅適用DGSM符合性／註冊路徑——因此此要求以是否存在無線電模組為條件。

standards_or_laws: Telecommunications Regulatory Authority (TRA), Sultanate of Oman — radio/type approval for radio-frequency equipment
GSO / ETSI-aligned radio standards — applicable to Wi-Fi / Bluetooth modules used in smart appliances
TRA type-approval / equipment registration — applied for via an Omani importer or authorised agent

summary.en: In China, wireless modules in appliances are subject to the State Radio Regulation of China (SRRC) type approval (radio transmission equipment type approval, administered by MIIT) and may also require CCC and Network Access Licence depending on the function. SRRC approval covers frequency, power, and radio parameters for the Chinese market. SRRC approval is for China only and is not recognised by Oman's TRA; a fresh TRA approval is required for the Omani market.
summary.zh: 在中国，器具中的无线电模块须取得中国国家无线电管理（SRRC）型号核准（无线电发射设备型号核准，由工业和信息化部管理），并可能视功能另需CCC和进网许可。SRRC核准涵盖面向中国市场的频率、功率及无线电参数。SRRC核准仅适用于中国，不被阿曼TRA认可；阿曼市场须重新取得TRA核准。
summary.zht: 在中國，器具中的無線電模組須取得中國國家無線電管理（SRRC）型號核准（無線電發射設備型號核准，由工業和信息化部管理），並可能視功能另需CCC和進網許可。SRRC核准涵蓋面向中國市場的頻率、功率及無線電參數。SRRC核准僅適用於中國，不被阿曼TRA認可；阿曼市場須重新取得TRA核准。

standards_or_laws: SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval — radio transmission equipment type approval; administered by MIIT
CCC — applicable to certain wireless equipment categories; Network Access Licence where applicable

gap.en: For smart/connected refrigerators this is a structural extra step with no usable Chinese substitute: (1) TRA radio approval — the Chinese SRRC approval is not recognised; the radio module must be approved by TRA against the Omani-applicable (GSO/ETSI-aligned) radio standards before import. (2) Frequency/power conformity — the module's frequency bands and power must be confirmed acceptable in Oman (the permitted Wi-Fi/Bluetooth bands and power masks may differ from China's SRRC limits). (3) Application route — TRA approval is filed via an Omani importer or authorised agent, not by the Chinese manufacturer directly. This requirement is conditional: a non-wireless refrigerator skips TRA entirely and only needs the DGSM route (frigom-market-001).
gap.zh: 对于智能／联网电冰箱，这是一项无可用中国替代的结构性附加步骤：（1）TRA无线电核准——中国SRRC核准不被认可；无线电模块在进口前须由TRA依据阿曼适用（与GSO/ETSI对齐）的无线电标准核准。（2）频率／功率符合性——须确认模块的频段和功率在阿曼可接受（允许的Wi-Fi/蓝牙频段及功率限值可能与中国SRRC限值不同）。（3）申请路径——TRA核准须经阿曼进口商或授权代理提交，而非由中国制造商直接办理。此要求为条件性：非无线电冰箱完全跳过TRA，仅需DGSM路径（frigom-market-001）。
gap.zht: 對於智慧／聯網電冰箱，這是一項無可用中國替代的結構性附加步驟：（1）TRA無線電核准——中國SRRC核准不被認可；無線電模組在進口前須由TRA依據阿曼適用（與GSO/ETSI對齊）的無線電標準核准。（2）頻率／功率符合性——須確認模組的頻段和功率在阿曼可接受（允許的Wi-Fi/藍牙頻段及功率限值可能與中國SRRC限值不同）。（3）申請路徑——TRA核准須經阿曼進口商或授權代理提交，而非由中國製造商直接辦理。此要求為條件性：非無線電冰箱完全跳過TRA，僅需DGSM路徑（frigom-market-001）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory if a radio module is present — TRA radio/type approval required before import and sale of wireless/smart refrigerators; not applicable to non-wireless models
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory if a radio module is present — SRRC type approval (and CCC/Network Access where applicable) required for the China market; not recognised by Oman

source.publisher: Telecommunications Regulatory Authority (TRA), Sultanate of Oman

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Wireless/smart refrigerators destined for Oman require TRA radio/type approval in addition to DGSM conformity; the Chinese SRRC approval is not recognised. The radio module must be approved by TRA (via an Omani importer/agent) against the Omani-applicable radio standards. Non-wireless refrigerators are out of TRA scope and follow only the DGSM route.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 销往阿曼的无线／智能电冰箱除DGSM符合性外还须取得TRA无线电／型号核准；中国SRRC核准不被认可。无线电模块须由TRA（经阿曼进口商／代理）依据阿曼适用无线电标准核准。非无线电冰箱不在TRA范围内，仅遵循DGSM路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 銷往阿曼的無線／智慧電冰箱除DGSM符合性外還須取得TRA無線電／型號核准；中國SRRC核准不被認可。無線電模組須由TRA（經阿曼進口商／代理）依據阿曼適用無線電標準核准。非無線電冰箱不在TRA範圍內，僅遵循DGSM路徑。
